stemHtml:
On the PFD of a modern commercial air transport aircraft, which of the following items are typically displayed?

1. Calibrated airspeed (CAS)
2. True airspeed (TAS)
3. Flight path vector (FPV)
4. Decision altitude/height
5. Failure flags and messages
6. Terrain information
7. ETA at next waypoint
8. ACAS/TCAS information
9. Fuel flow
